'''√ng-sh-z''' ('''kangashaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:curl|curl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:curl|curl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ng-sh-z
|-
! Lemma
| kangashaz
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thingashaz || jingashaz || shingashaz || kingashaz
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthungashaz || jujungashaz || shushungashaz || kukungashaz
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thungashaz || jungashaz || shungashaz || kungashaz
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thungashaz || jungashaz || shungashaz || kungashaz
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thengashaz || jengashaz || shengashaz || kengashaz
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothongashaz || jojongashaz || shoshongashaz || kokongashaz
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thongashaz || jongashaz || shongashaz || kongashaz
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thongashaz || jongashaz || shongashaz || kongashaz
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngashaz || ngashaz || ngashaz || ngashaz
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngashaz || ngashaz || ngashaz || ngashaz
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngashaz || ngashaz || ngashaz || ngashaz
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngashaz || ngashaz || ngashaz || ngashaz
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thængashaz || jængashaz || shængashaz || kængashaz
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathangashaz || jajangashaz || shashangashaz || kakangashaz
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thangashaz || jangashaz || shangashaz || kangashaz
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thangashaz || jangashaz || shangashaz || kangashaz
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shangashaz
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshangashaz
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishangashaz
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shangashaznü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshangashaznknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishangashaznü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shangashazshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshangashaznkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishangashazshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shangashazro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshangashaznkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishangashazro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shangashazmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshangashaznkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishangashazmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shangashazsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshangashaznksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishangashazsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shangashazng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshangashaznkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishangashazng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shangashazya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshangashaznkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishangashazya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shangashazyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshangashaznkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishangashazyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shangashaznüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshangashaznknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishangashaznüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shangashaznüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangashaznknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangashaznüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shangashaznümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshangashaznknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangashaznümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shangashazshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshangashaznkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishangashazshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shangashazshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangashaznkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangashazshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shangashazshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshangashaznkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangashazshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shangashazronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshangashaznkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishangashazronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shangashazroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshangashaznkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishangashazroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shangashazromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshangashaznkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangashazromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shangashazmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshangashaznkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishangashazmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shangashazmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshangashaznkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishangashazmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shangashazmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangashaznkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangashazmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
